title: Deez Sacks!
description: Adds compatibility between Supplementaries sacks and EasyShulkerBoxes features!
body:
**Deez Sacks** is a datapack that bridges the inventory management feature added by EasyShulkerBoxes to work with the sacks added by the mod Supplementaries!

This datapack requires both EasyShulkerBoxes and Supplementaries, its optional if you want to use Dye Depot or SupplementariesSquared, but if you do use the two also download [Dye the World](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-the-world) because if not then the new colored sacks will not have textures

If you changed the quantity of slots on Supplementaries config, simply change the measurements* of each sack inside the datapack file.

*The default value is "height: 3" and "width: 3", equaling to 9 slots

Thanks to [Kelpie](https://modrinth.com/user/Kelpiesaurus) for the name that made me laugh!
